case_title: MIRIAM MIRANDA VS. VANESSA CARIAS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-21-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-21-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, MIRIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARIAS, VANESSA CARIAS, VANESSA DBA VANESSA CARIAS MEDIA GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
